items.name: 旧工藤家住宅 土蔵
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 / 建造物

en.name_en: Storehouse of the Former Kudō Family Residence
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (building), the earthen storehouse (dozō) of the former Kudō family residence. Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2006-03-24. Located in Kosaka.

items.name: 木造阿弥陀三尊像
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 / 美術工芸品 / 彫刻

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (fine art and craft, sculpture), a wooden Amida triad. Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2006-03-24. Located in Kosaka.

items.name: 台付き土器
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 / 美術工芸品 / 考古資料

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (fine art and craft, archaeological material), a pedestaled earthenware vessel. Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2000-03-30. Located in Kosaka.

items.name: 岩偶
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 / 美術工芸品 / 考古資料

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (fine art and craft, archaeological material), a stone figurine (gangū). Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2000-03-30. Located in Kosaka.

items.name: クルトネットー資料
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 / 美術工芸品 / 歴史資料

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (fine art and craft, historical material), materials relating to Kurt Netto. Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2000-03-30. Located in Kosaka.

items.name: 毛馬内御代官所御絵図
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 / 美術工芸品 / 歴史資料

en.name_en: Pictorial Map of the Kemanai Magistrate's Office
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (fine art and craft, historical material), a pictorial map of the Kemanai magistrate's office. Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2003-02-24. Located in Kosaka.

items.name: 地蔵堂
items.subcategory: 有形文化財 / 美術工芸品 / 歴史資料

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (fine art and craft, historical material), a Jizō hall (jizōdō). Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2016-03-06. Located in Kosaka.
A folk cultural property (intangible), the insect-sending ritual (mushiokuri) of Nigorikawa. Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2004-03-26. Located in Kosaka.
A folk cultural property (intangible), the Gongen dance (gongen mai) of Ideha Shrine. Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2007-03-28. Located in Kosaka.

items.name: 小坂環状列石墳墓
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A monument (site), the Kosaka stone circle burial site (kanjō resseki funbo). Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2000-03-30. Located in Kosaka.

items.name: 鴇鉱山精錬所・選鉱場跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Site of the Toki Mine Smelter and Ore-Dressing Plant
en.description_en: A monument (site), the site of the Toki mine smelter and ore-dressing plant. Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2002-03-22. Located in Kosaka.

items.name: 和井内ヒメマスふ化場跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Site of the Wainai Kokanee Salmon Hatchery
en.description_en: A monument (site), the site of the Wainai kokanee salmon (himemasu) hatchery. Town-designated by Kosaka, Akita, on 2004-03-26. Located in Kosaka.
